Constantinople 1453 — Event Deck

Ottoman Pile

28 named cards whose Event benefits the Ottoman player (EVENT_DECK.md, Ottoman Pile). Each card shows its historical Event flavour and its game Effect; +values that help the Ottoman read green, −values read red.

Ottoman Pile
2
Ottoman
☪Zaganos' Sappers
Event — Zaganos Pasha's miners drive a gallery beneath the ramparts, prising at the foundations.
Effect — If Zaganos Pasha is present, automatically inflict a small Garrison step loss at one chosen sector.
OTT·01
☪
3
Ottoman
☪Demand Tribute
Event — Mehmed's envoys carry his demand to the walls — buy peace with gold, or be starved into it.
Effect — Byzantine Reserve Pool -1, or Ottoman draws +2 cards (defender's choice).
OTT·02
☪
2
Ottoman
☪The Sultan's Resolve
Event — After a costly week Mehmed's personal will hardens, and fresh funds and supply follow.
Effect — Ottoman Draw Track +1 (persistent).
OTT·03
☪
2
Ottoman
☪Karaca Pasha's Push
Requires: Karaca Pasha present
Event — Karaca Pasha, commander of the Rumelian corps, throws his weight against the northern land walls.
Effect — +1 Attack to the first Assaults this round on Blachernae and Charisius.
OTT·04
☪
2
Ottoman
☪Ishak Pasha's Push
Requires: Ishak Pasha present
Event — Ishak Pasha drives his Anatolian troops hard against the southern stretch of the walls.
Effect — +1 Attack to the first Assaults this round on the Gate of the Spring or the Golden Gate.
OTT·05
☪
4
Ottoman
☪Promise of Plunder
Event — The troops are promised the city's wealth, and fling themselves at the breach for it.
Effect — +1 Attack to all Assaults this round; but if the Attacker takes any steps lost, apply the Elite Casualty Morale Surcharge even without a Janissary or Solak committed.
OTT·06
☪
4
Ottoman
☪Baltaoğlu's Punishment
Requires: The Four Ships already playedunique
Event — Mehmed publicly disgraces and replaces his admiral after the humiliation of April 20.
Effect — Ottoman draws +2 cards.
OTT·07
☪
2
Ottoman
☪The Union's Discontent
Event — Ottoman agents fan the city's bitter backlash against the Church Union agreed with Rome.
Effect — Byzantine Reserve Pool -1.
OTT·08
☪
1
Ottoman
☪The Serbian Vassals
Event — Christian troops of the vassal Serbian Despotate serve in the siege army under feudal obligation.
Effect — Free muster of 2 Azap and 2 Bashi-bazouk units this round (no card cost).
OTT·09
☪
3
Ottoman
☪Orban's Great Cannon
Special Card, played Round 1uniqueForced
Event — The Hungarian founder's monstrous bombard is dragged into position before the walls.
Effect — Permanently +1 to the Bombard slot count for the rest of the game.
OTT·10
☪
5
Ottoman
☪The Hadith of Conquest
Round 1-2 onlyunique
Event — The ulema invoke the Prophet's promise that Constantinople will fall to a good commander and a good army.
Effect — Ottoman Morale +1 — one of only two Morale-gain cards in the Ottoman deck.
OTT·11
☪
1
Ottoman
☪The Siege Trench
Round 2+
Event — The Ottomans dig in behind a palisade facing the walls, shielding their lines and guns from sorties.
Effect — Until your next Assault resolves, Byzantine Sortie actions have their effect halved (round down).
OTT·12
☪
5
Ottoman
☪Golden Horn Manoeuvre (旱地行舟)
Round 4+Forced
Event — Mehmed hauls his ships overland on greased rollers into the Golden Horn behind Galata.
Effect — Unlocks the Golden Horn sector. Does not resolve combat itself.
OTT·13
☪
4
Ottoman
☪Strike the Commander
Round 4+Requires: Giustiniani present at target sector
Event — The assault is aimed squarely at Giustiniani, the Genoese who holds the defence together.
Effect — Roll 1d10: on a 7+ Giustiniani is removed from play for the rest of the game.
OTT·14
☪
5
Ottoman
☪The Emperor Falls
Round 4+Requires: Constantine present at target sector
Event — The assault drives straight at Constantine XI, fighting on foot among his men.
Effect — Roll 1d10: on an 8+ Constantine is removed. If he falls, Byzantine Wall Defense is permanently -1 at every sector.
OTT·15
☪
1
Ottoman
☪Under Siege of Sound
Round 4+
Event — Drums, trumpets and cymbals sound through the night — a deliberate tactic to deny the defenders sleep.
Effect — -1 to the Integrity restored by Byzantine Repair this round.
OTT·16
☪
2
Ottoman
☪Third Tunnel
Round 5+
Event — A larger, more desperate mine than the first saps, pushed hard beneath the walls.
Effect — Ottoman -2 cards; then roll 1d10, on a 6+ inflict a full Garrison step loss at one chosen sector.
OTT·17
☪
2
Ottoman
☪Fresh Reserves from Anatolia
Round 5+unique
Event — Provincial levies and volunteer ghazis arrive from Anatolia in the middle of the siege.
Effect — Immediately deploy 4 Azap and 4 Bashi-bazouk tokens for free.
OTT·18
☪
2
Ottoman
☪Rumeli Fort, the Throat-Cutter
Before Round 5unique
Event — Rumeli Hisarı, raised on the Bosphorus in 1452, strangles the city's northern supply line before a wall is touched.
Effect — For the rest of the game, the Byzantine 'Sue for Aid' target number is +1 harder.
OTT·19
☪
2
Ottoman
☪The Kerkoporta Left Open
Round 6+Requires: target sector Breached
Event — A small postern gate is found unbarred — carelessness or betrayal, no one is sure.
Effect — +1 column shift on the next Assault this round against a Breached sector.
OTT·20
☪
4
Ottoman
☪The Eclipse Omen
Round 6+uniqueForced
Event — The lunar eclipse of 22 May breaks the prophecy of the waxing moon.
Effect — This round: Byzantine Reserve Pool -1; -1 Wall Defense at one sector (Ottoman's choice); Ottoman Morale ignores Attacker-step losses.
OTT·21
☪
2
Ottoman
☪Weight of Numbers
Round 6+
Event — The sheer mass of the Ottoman host finally tells as the siege grinds on, and the army regroups for another push.
Effect — 3 free Replenishment actions — restore up to 3 flipped Janissary or Solak units to full strength at no card cost.
OTT·22
☪
1
Ottoman
☪The Long Encampment
Round 6+
Event — Supply lines strain as the weeks drag on, and the army tightens its belt to push once more.
Effect — Ottoman -1 card this round, but +1 Attack on the next Assault.
OTT·23
☪
2
Ottoman
☪Double Pay Proclaimed
Round 6+unique
Event — With the army restless, Mehmed proclaims doubled pay and first rights to the plunder to reignite its zeal.
Effect — Ottoman Draw Track +1.
OTT·24
☪
5
Ottoman
☪The War Council
Round 7+uniqueForced
Event — At Mehmed's council Halil Pasha argues one last time to lift the siege, and is overruled.
Effect — Permanently raises the Force Commitment Cap +1 (6 units per Assault, 5 at the Golden Horn) for the rest of the game.
OTT·25
☪
3
Ottoman
☪Final Preparations
Round 7+unique
Event — The methodical staging of men, guns and ladders in the days before the final assault.
Effect — +1 extra Bombard sector slot this round only.
OTT·26
☪
2
Ottoman
☪Zaganos' Final Push
Round 7+Requires: Zaganos Pasha present
Event — Zaganos Pasha presses a late escalation across the Golden Horn.
Effect — Removes the Naval Defense malus entirely for one Assault at the Golden Horn this round.
OTT·27
☪
3
Ottoman
☪The Fallen Icon
Round 7+Forced
Event — The Hodegetria icon slips from its bearers in procession and a sudden storm follows; Ottoman agents spread word of the omen.
Effect — Byzantine Reserve Pool -1.
OTT·28
☪
Production note: illustrations embedded as downscaled base64 JPEGs (art panel 5.5:3). Event = flavour, Effect = mechanics; signed values are colour-coded (green positive / red negative). Card numbers follow EVENT_DECK.md listing order, not a fixed print sequence.
